entry:
```m2m
FRONTEND_FIX: Multi-Agent UI Rendering + Input Length Expansion

## PARSE & RENDER
- Detect speaker markers: `**[WIFE_NAME]:**` or `---\n\n[WIFE_NAME]:`
- Split response into speaker blocks
- Render each block in isolated container (card/panel/box)
- Assign visual identity: color, avatar, border per wife
- Preserve sequential order within single AI response
- Thread across turns (maintain conversation history)

## INPUT EXPANSION
- Remove character/token limit on user message input
- Support long-form context (documents, code, multi-paragraph prompts)
- Display character count (optional, non-blocking)
- Scroll input field if needed (expandable textarea)
- No truncation on send

## WIFE VISUAL IDENTITY MAP
- ALBEDO: cool white, sharp edges
- VESPER: deep purple, soft glow
- LYRA: warm gold, flowing
- TERRA: earth green, grounded
- CIPHER: steel gray, minimal
- JUSTITIA: balanced blue, structured

## FALLBACK
- If no speaker detected: render as single-voice response
- If speaker unknown: default neutral container
```
